calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petitioners Michael Tate And Nikolai Papa Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award (Notices)
Off Calendar May-31-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Tyler Jacobs, Esq. (562-583-2128; tjacobs@fmglaw.com) of Freeman Mathis & Gary, LLP for Petitioners.
No other appearances.

Not argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONERS MICHAEL TATE and NIKOLAI PAPA's Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award:

Michael Tate and Nikolai Papa's unopposed "petition to confirm arbitration award" is granted.

Order is signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/RBU)
